trail.val: FY26 raised to >$1.1B rev with >$140M non-GAAP operating income; Q2 guide $180-198M; true demand $1.4-1.5B, internal target $1.2B (capacity-gated)

forward.note: FY26 capacity-gated not demand-gated; 2H'26 a step function (Q3/Q4 each +60-80% QoQ).

trail.val: raised to ~$471M/month by mid-2027 (~$90M 100G/400G + $217M 800G + $164M 1.6T; ~780k transceivers/mo; ~40% US capacity)

forward.note: FinTwit frames $471M/mo = ~$5.6B ARR; marquee bull number.

trail.val: 1.6T first revenue late-2026, big ramp 2027; Lin: 'more than $2B for 1.6T transceivers' next year; returning hyperscaler placed first 1.6T volume order
>650k/mo by YE26 (~30% Texas), >930k/mo by YE27 (>50% Texas); +350% laser-fab capacity

forward.note: Texas step-function the validation; Q3 print is the 'validation event' everyone cites.

trail.val: 29.2% now; 35% exit-26, 40% non-GAAP GM by Q3/Q4 2027 as mix shifts to 800G/1.6T + laser

forward.note: 40% GM target a 2027 exit aspiration off 29% today.

trail.val: targeting top-3 laser producer worldwide by YE27; 4-inch -> 6-inch InP by YE27; ELSFP/CPO laser ramp toward ~400k pcs/mo by 2027; 3-yr LTAs under negotiation with ~3 customers
AAOI among new entrants into merchant laser market as CPO laser TAM scales toward ~$1B; oversupply/glut risk flagged

forward.note: In-house InP at the binding constraint is the moat (bull) vs capacity-flooding (bear).
